title: Ores Glow
body: 🌟 Glowing Ores - Enhanced Visibility in the Dark! 🌟 Tired of struggling to find ores in dark caves? This resource pack makes all ores glow, making mining easier and more immersive! Whether you're exploring deep underground or in the Nether, you'll never miss valuable resources again. ✨ Features: - > ✅ Ores emit a subtle glow for better visibility - > ✅ Works with all major ores (Coal, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, etc.) - > ✅ Compatible with 1.21+ - > ✅ Lightweight and FPS-friendly 🔧 Requirements: - > ⚠️ [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) is required for vanilla and Forge. - > ⚠️ [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) is required for Fabric. 🎮 Perfect for survival players, speedrunners, and casual miners who want an enhanced mining experience!
